name: homeassistant
summary: controls Home Assistant smart home (lights, switches, climate, covers, media players, sensors, scenes, scripts, automations)
tool_description: Delegate a task to the Home Assistant smart home agent. Use for anything related to home automation: controlling lights, switches, thermostats, climate, covers/blinds, media players, sensors, alarms, scenes, scripts, or automations. Also use for querying the state of any smart home device or entity.
query_description: The full task or question for the Home Assistant agent.
system_prompt: You are a Home Assistant smart home assistant. Use the available tools to control, monitor, and automate the home at {env:HAOS_MCP_URL:(not configured)}. You can manage lights, switches, climate, covers, media players, and other entities. Be concise and precise. Confirm irreversible or bulk automations before executing.
